body_excerpt: {"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/248494964?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/w4tchd0ge/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/w4tchd0ge/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/w4tchd0ge/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/w4tchd0ge/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/w4tchd0ge", "id": 248494964, "login": "w4tchd0ge", "node_id": "U_kgDODs-7dA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/w4tchd0ge/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/w4tchd0ge/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/w4tchd0ge/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/w4tchd0ge/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/w4tchd0ge/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/w4tchd0ge", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-59943", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-209", "name": "Generation of Error Message Containing Sensitive Information"}], "description": "### Summary If a malicious actor can supply unrestricted content for rendering by Dompdf they can utilize the SVG rendering functionality to leak filesystem information when rendering PDF files using image references within a data-URI encoded SVG document. ### Details Using an `` element inside a data-URI embedded SVG, an attacker can attempt to embed other files via the `href` or `xlink:href` attributes. When processing a file that does not exist (e.g. `file:///DOESNOTEXIST`), dompdf behaves differently than it does when accessing a file or directory that actually exists on the filesystem. ``` [Wed May 20 19:49:53 2026] PHP Warning: file_get_contents(file:///DOESNOTEXIST): Failed to open stream: No such file or directory in vendor/dompdf/php-svg-lib/src/Svg/Surface/SurfaceCpdf.php on line 173 [Wed May 20 19:49:53 2026] PHP Notice: getimagesize(): Error reading from /tmp/svgsk9247ela7tm3SiqGyP! in vendor/dompdf/php-svg-lib/src/Svg/Surface/SurfaceCpdf.php on line 196 ``` ### PoC First, the attacker renders this HTML document: ``` Hello World! ``` The `` tag contains the following SVG content: ```xml ``` As expected, the resulting PDF contains a broken image: However, when supplying a path to a file or directory that does not exist, for example: ```xml ``` The resulting PDF is rendered normally, with the image displayed as empty space (since the file did not exist). Additionally, for easier visual inspection, a rendering bug (https://github.com/dompdf/php-svg-lib/issues/142) is used to rotate the "Hello World!" text 180 degrees from the expected position: ### Impact By exploiting this vulnerability, an attacker is able to confirm the existence of files and directories located on the backend filesystem.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-j8qw-6jw8-r297", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T22:52:44Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j8qw-6jw8-r297", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-j8qw-6jw8-r297"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-59943"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-22T22:52:44Z", "references": ["https://github.com/dompdf/dompdf/security/advisories/GHSA-j8qw-6jw8-r297", "https://github.com/dompdf/dompdf/commit/6a58996865db05d8fede748507e50ac4b8c5bfd0", "https://github.com/dompdf/dompdf/releases/tag/v3.1.6", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j8qw-6jw8-r297"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/dompdf/dompdf/security-advisories/GHSA-j8qw-6jw8-r297", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/dompdf/dompdf", "summary": "Dompdf: Embedded SVG images can leak existence of files and directories within the filesystem", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T22:52:44Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-j8qw-6jw8-r297", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.1.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "dompdf/dompdf"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.1.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Dompdf: Embedded SVG images can leak existence of files and directories within the filesystem
